'''Varr''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Witches of Dathomir|Dathomiri Witch]] who was friends with [[Teneniel Djo]] and later fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and became a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]].
